---
name: Lesson feedback (something was confusing or broken)
about: A step didn't work, a checkpoint failed, or an explanation lost you
title: "[lesson] "
labels: ["course"]
---

<!--
This is the most useful kind of report for a teaching repo. If a step lost you,
it'll lose the next person too — telling us is a contribution.
-->

**Which lesson?**

<!-- e.g. course/02-memory/2.3b-wire-into-memory -->

**What happened vs. what you expected**

<!-- "The checkpoint says I should see X, but I got Y." -->

**Where exactly did it go wrong?**

<!-- The step number / command / the blank you were filling in. Paste the command
     you ran and its output if you can. -->

```text
(paste command + output here)
```

**Was it a wording/confusion issue or a code/checkpoint issue?**

- [ ] I was confused by an explanation or an undefined term
- [ ] A command or `solution/` didn't work
- [ ] A checkpoint passed/failed when it shouldn't have
- [ ] A link was dead or pointed somewhere wrong

**Environment (for code issues)**

- OS:
- `node --version`:
- Provider / `LLM_API_FORMAT` (if relevant):
